name: Nutty Chocolate Mint Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy gauge saucepan, combine marshmallow cream, sugar, evaporated milk, butter, and salt.
2. Bring to a full rolling boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat. Add mint-chocolate chips; stir until melted and mixture is smooth.
4. Stir in chopped nuts and vanilla extract.
5. Pour into foil-lined 8-inch square pan.
6. Chill until firm, about 2 hours.
7. Cut into 1-inch squares.
